name: query_knowledge_base
description: Query the troubleshooting knowledge base for general product information, FAQs, and troubleshooting guides. Returns relevant documentation excerpts with confidence scores. Use this for broad searches when you need comprehensive information about a product or issue.

query.description: The search query text to find relevant troubleshooting information

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5)

name: search_troubleshooting
description: Search for specific product troubleshooting guides based on product name and issue type. Returns formatted troubleshooting steps and solutions. Use this when you have a specific product and a specific type of issue (e.g., bluetooth connectivity, battery drain, charging problems).

name: get_faq
description: Retrieve frequently asked questions (FAQ) for a specific product. Returns common questions and answers about the product. Use this when customers have general questions about product features, specifications, warranty, or usage.

product_name.description: Name of the product to retrieve FAQs for
